description: This version has undergone a complete revamp! Some features have been removed, others have been added, and overall performance has been improved. ⚡
MySQL changed to hikaricp for better performance
Tempban, tempmute, permaban added to MongoDB
messages null pointer exception bug fix
Message example files has been moved in the sourcecode
Some bug fixes have been made with the handling of the messages
Signs click events have been improved for the new Version
Update method updated for the new Version names
mongodb removed spigotmongodbutils, mongodb is now build in
Chat Color added option to use %YourColor% in messages
changed Staffchat command to support custom formatting and Support to enable or disable the Plugin's Prefix
Added /emhelp command help GUI with paged command items
Command help items now show description, usage, aliases, permission, and extra notes in hover lore
Added /essentialshelp alias and /emhelp text fallback for console or chat-based help
Improved ProtocolLib skin refresh so /nick <nickname> <skin> updates visible player skins more reliably
Nickname reset now restores the original skin data more reliably
Fixed a /nick skin refresh crash on newer ProtocolLib/Purpur builds when GameProfile properties are not exposed through ProtocolLib wrappers
Added a fallback skin refresh path for Java 26/Purpur builds where ProtocolLib cannot mutate final player-info packet action fields
Updated /flyspeed with reset/default/normal arguments and tab completion
Fixed /eco set for other players and added support for both amount-first and player-first usage
Hardened economy commands so /pay, /eco, and /bank check transaction failures and account creation more reliably
Added /eco remove permissions and fixed /pay usage to support both amount-first and player-first order
Fixed the update checker to use the correct release channel and download folder
Auto-download now verifies downloaded jars before moving them into the update folder
Added config comments explaining AutoDownload and checkForUpdates
Added Geyser-Spigot and Floodgate as optional soft dependencies
Updated README.md and SpigotMC description for the new release
Fixed SQL ban/mute table creation for SQL and SQLite storage so login/chat checks cannot query essentialsmini_ban_mute before it exists
Ban/mute SQL lookups now fall back safely instead of throwing chat/login stack traces when storage is unavailable
Reduced SQL connection log spam by removing successful connection messages
Fixed /nick skin refresh crashes on newer ProtocolLib/Purpur builds when GameProfile properties are not exposed through ProtocolLib wrappers
Added a fallback skin refresh path for Java 26/Purpur builds where ProtocolLib cannot mutate final player-info packet action fields
Skin refresh now avoids rewriting final player-info packet fields directly, preventing ClientboundPlayerInfoUpdatePacket.actions warnings on Java 26/Purpur
/nick now writes fetched skin textures to the live player profile before refreshing viewers so the selected skin is actually applied
Skin writes now fall back from Bukkit profile objects to the NMS GameProfile when Bukkit does not expose Mojang texture properties
Skin property reflection now supports newer authlib accessors, private property-map fields, and inherited Multimap methods used by modern Purpur/Java builds
Mojang PropertyMap texture updates now use the Guava Multimap API directly, fixing failed texture insert/remove operations on newer authlib builds
Live skin writes now prefer the NMS player GameProfile before Bukkit profile copies and handle immutable property maps without aborting /nick
Added a Paper/Purpur PlayerProfile runtime path for servers that expose setPlayerProfile
Added Spigot/NMS fallbacks that mutate the backing authlib property map or replace the player's GameProfile when the public property map is immutable
Skin refresh no longer sends remove/add tab-list packets to the nicked player, preventing empty tab lists and signed chat validation errors
Added skinDebug diagnostics for /nick skin lookup, live profile texture writes, ProtocolLib packet choices, packet sends, and entity refreshes
config.yml now merges missing bundled defaults and comments on startup or /essentialsmini reload without overwriting configured values
